critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: confirm pkg_hash s7-b6f2e3 matches meta/project_knowledge_graph.json (unchanged this session — no structural code landed); npm test expect 498 passing.

READ docs/execution_plan.md section 'P8 — Internal Production Tools' IN FULL before writing S8.1 code — it carries load-bearing decisions (dm-0065-dm-0070) that change what 'done' means for REQ-130/131/132/133, not just narrative color.

REQ-130/131 P8 SHARE IS LOGIC/DATA ONLY (dm-0065): zero canvas/DOM/WebGL imports anywhere in tools/level_editor/ or tools/debug/ this phase. The 'visual' part is explicitly P9's job. Do not attempt to render anything.

tools/ ISOLATION (dm-0066): from S8.1 onward, tools/ may consume src/gen/ and src/eval/ ONLY through their named public entry points (evaluateLevel/judgeLevel, the P4 audits, analyzeTape, processCampaign, manufactureLevel, discoverOpportunities) — never gate/search internals. Nothing under src/ may ever import tools/. tools/ never modifies src/gen/ or src/eval/. Land test/unit/ToolsIsolation.test.ts at S8.1 — do not defer it.

PROFILER WALL-CLOCK SCOPE (dm-0067): Date.now()/performance.now() are permitted ONLY inside tools/profiler/ (built at S8.4) for diagnostic reporting. They must never appear in src/core|systems|components|entities|schema|eval|gen, and profiler output must never feed WorldState or a replay-determinism-checked value.

DEATH HEATMAPS ARE REPLAY-DERIVED (dm-0068), not live-position-logged: telemetry capture (S8.5) records only {levelId, seed, tape, outcome}; death coordinates are recovered by replaying that capture through the existing Engine (S8.6). Do not add a live position-streaming capture path.

DIFFICULTY-SPIKE DETECTION IS P6'S, NOT NEW (dm-0069): S8.6 must reuse CampaignDirector.processCampaign verbatim (P6, unmodified) — do not write a second spike-detection algorithm in tools/telemetry/. Zero modifications to any file under src/eval/campaign/ (dm-0047 isolation rule).

DEBUG VARIABLE EDITS GO THROUGH StateManager.commit() (dm-0070, built at S8.3): never a direct field write on a live WorldState snapshot. The existing freeze-on-commit test pattern must extend to catch a regression here.

REQ-032 NOTE: already VERIFIED at P6 close (P6,P8 phase column) per a documented four-state convention (see docs/execution_plan.md 'Note on REQ-032') — P8 (S8.5-S8.6) still delivers real, previously-unbuilt engineering for it, but does NOT need a further backlog transition. Do not re-litigate or reopen P6.

src/gen/ AND src/eval/ ARE STABLE, TESTED, SCAN-ENFORCED SUBTREES (dm-0057/dm-0022): P8 consumes them as libraries through public seams only. Do NOT modify src/gen/ or src/eval/ during P8, mirroring how P7 treated P4/P5/P6 as read-only.
